nodes.label: Create Task
nodes.description: Admin fills in task details: title, description, priority, assignee, deadline.

nodes.label: Validate Task
nodes.description: Check required fields and priority is high/medium/low.

transitions.condition: All required fields present and priority valid

nodes.label: Save Task
nodes.description: Persist the new task in the database.

nodes.label: Show Validation Error
nodes.description: Display error messages to admin and allow re-entry.

nodes.label: Notify Assignee
nodes.description: Automatically notify the assigned staff member about the new task.

nodes.label: Staff Select Task
nodes.description: Staff views assigned tasks and selects one to work on.

nodes.label: Update Status
nodes.description: Staff chooses new status: pending → in_progress → completed (or blocked).

nodes.label: Validate Status Transition
nodes.description: Ensure the requested status change is allowed from current status.

nodes.label: Update Task Status
nodes.description: Persist the new status in the database.

nodes.label: Notify Admin
nodes.description: Automatically notify admin when task status changes.

nodes.label: Add Comment
nodes.description: Staff adds a note to the task (optional).

nodes.label: Check Overdue
nodes.description: Determine if the task deadline has passed based on current date.

nodes.label: Notify Overdue
nodes.description: Send automatic notification about overdue task to admin and assignee.

nodes.label: View Dashboard
nodes.description: Admin views dashboard with total tasks, by status, by assignee, overdue filter.

nodes.label: View All Tasks
nodes.description: Admin views the full task list with search and filter options.

nodes.label: Select Action on Task
nodes.description: Admin chooses what to do with the selected task: edit details, reassign, change dates, or delete.

nodes.label: Edit Task Details
nodes.description: Admin modifies task title, description, or priority.

nodes.label: Reassign Task
nodes.description: Admin changes the assignee of the task to another staff member.

nodes.label: Change Task Dates
nodes.description: Admin modifies the deadline and optionally sets a new start date.

nodes.label: Delete Task Confirmation
nodes.description: Admin confirms deletion with a reason before removing the task.

nodes.label: Save Changes & Notify
nodes.description: Persist the changes and notify the affected staff member about the update.

nodes.label: Delete Task & Notify
nodes.description: Remove the task and send notification to the previous assignee.
